feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: You break into my place, steal my stuff, trash the joint. I feel transgressed an…

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Supergirl is dead.
entry.content: Deadline said Supergirl has over $100 million in marketing. They also said it cost $170 million to as high as $183 million to make. So if we go with the low cost of $170 million that means the total cost is $270 million. So the break even point for Supergirl would be $540 million...thats when they will actually start making a profit in cinemas from the film. In scope, Superman made $618 million world wide but needed $700 million to break even. So that was a failure as well, no matter how the shi

entry.content: EU, UK, China, Korea and Japan need to simultaneously attack this country from both sides and take the entire land away from them. Their resourceful huge lands don’t deserve to belong to them. Just remigrate all the ethnic Russians to eastern Ukraine and call it a deal. They don’t truly bring any values to this world.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: What can I do against cyber stalking? I've been here for a long time, and now so…
entry.content: What can I do against cyber stalking? I've been here for a long time, and now some deranged people are after me. They mass report my posts, stalk me on other social media and reveal my accounts on this site among many other bad things. Somehow, they are able to post about what I experienced throughout the day with a high accuracy, which goes beyond of just knowing my interests. These people, mostly Eastern Europeans, are self-described pedophiles, criminals, homosexuals, radical muslims, misogyn

entry.content: >High Stakes Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. entry.title: /int/ International: Anybody else finds it uncanny and extremely bizzare seeing men with blonde, ging…
entry.content: Anybody else finds it uncanny and extremely bizzare seeing men with blonde, ginger, or red hair? Excuse me, but what business have you -as a cis man- sporting a feminine hair color unironically? I don't care that it's your natural hair color, dye it black or dark brown unless you're gay. That's not to say there's anything wrong with being gay but people like that are blurring the line. I'll provide an example, Look at this guy in pic related at tell me he's not in a committed loving relationship

entry.content: Don't fall for their social shaming tactics. They aren't worried about men ending up alone; they're worried about running out of men to settle down with them once they're old and used up—after "Chad" is done using them as a secret hookup. The more men focus on their own lives and turn their backs on them, the more "crazy cat ladies" will die alone. entry.title: /g/ Technology: Orwellian times
entry.content: Soon all governments around the world will finish ID-gating the whole internet and VPNs. even ID checks at OS level. Not even the supposed "Land of the Free" is safe. The First, Fourth, and Fourteenth Amendments are useless. I guess we should start thinking of new hobbies, what are you all planning? I need some ideas for myself the world has gotten so boring there's not much to do.
